item.title: DEBT: Remove force-unwraps in AIProviderManager and ModelStorageManager
item.intent: Force-unwrap on URL literals and directory lookups can crash the app on init — production code must never assume runtime values are non-nil
item.description: AIProviderManager.init() uses URL(string:)! for modelDownloadURL and cloudRelayURL. ModelStorageManager uses .first! on FileManager directory lookup. Replace with validated constants or proper nil handling with descriptive errors. Per architecture rule [A-048], no force-unwrap outside tests.
acceptanceCriteria: No force-unwrap (!) remains in AIProviderManager or ModelStorageManager production code
URL constants are validated at compile time or fail gracefully with EMError
Directory lookup uses guard-let with a descriptive error
App still initializes correctly on all supported devices
